name: Careem Pay
description: Refer a friend to Careem Pay — earn AED 40 in your wallet for every friend who sends at least AED 1,000 using your link. Up to AED 2,000 in total (50 successful referrals).

name: Mashreq NEO
description: Refer up to 5 friends to Mashreq NEO in 90 days — earn AED 100–200 per successful referral.

name: ADCB Hayyak
description: Refer a friend to ADCB — when they open an eligible account, you both get a cash reward.

name: Etisalat by e&
description: Invite a friend to e& — get 500MB of free mobile data per successful invite.

name: du Pay
description: Invite friends to du Pay — they enter your code at sign-up via the "Got a referral code?" screen, and both of you earn rewards once they complete their first qualifying transaction.
